Rule 1 (ID verification ONLY in Table) - TAP page has NO IDVerificationModal (confirmed by code and UI), TABLE page has IDVerificationModal that appears for alcohol items. All previously fixed features confirmed: tips attributed to specific staff (Carlos=$61.4, Ana=$8.8, Marco=$25.4), Inside Tabs shows 7 guests including closed sessions (Alex Turner #105).
